_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Document original condition of digital and/or associated evidence (e.g., via digital photographs, written reports, hash function checking).
reference_document_element_description: Produce analytical documentation that meets the evidence standard required for regulatory, audit, or executive decision support contexts.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-006 (RC, cosine: 0.461), RC-K-005 (RC, cosine: 0.425).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.5/10 (raw 0.451). Shared vocabulary: [evidence]. DCWF-only terms [associated, checking, condition, digital, document, function] vs WIDAI-only terms [analytical, audit, contexts, decision, documentation, executive] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.841 (P=0.831, R=0.851). Balanced P/R — the 17-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Document original condition of digital and/or associated evidence (e.g., via dig" and "Produce analytical documentation that meets the evidence standard required for r" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.479 ≈ STS 0.451 (gap 0.028). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [evidence] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.1%. Shared tokens: [evidence]. DCWF-only: [associated, checking, condition, digital, document, function]. WIDAI-only: [analytical, audit, contexts, decision, documentation, executive].
